title: clat-rs configuration
description: Configuration schema for the clat-rs 464XLAT CLAT daemon (RFC 6877)

anyOf.description: Neither prefix is required if the CLAT prefix will be provided at runtime via gRPC (e.g., from a DHCPv6-PD hook script).

clat_ipv4_addr.description: IPv4 address assigned to the CLAT TUN interface (gateway for LAN clients)

clat_ipv4_networks.description: IPv4 subnets served by the CLAT in CIDR notation. At least one subnet is required.

clat_v6_prefix.description: Explicit /96 IPv6 prefix for CLAT-side address embedding (source addresses per RFC 6052). Optional if dhcpv6_pd_prefix is set or if prefix is provided via gRPC at runtime.

dhcpv6_pd_prefix.description: DHCPv6 Prefix Delegation prefix (e.g., /48 or /56). The first /96 subnet is derived automatically for CLAT translation. Optional if clat_v6_prefix is set or if prefix is provided via gRPC at runtime.

plat_v6_prefix.description: /96 IPv6 prefix for PLAT-side address embedding (destination addresses). Use 64:ff9b::/96 for the well-known NAT64 prefix.

uplink_interface.description: Host network interface used for IPv6 uplink

mtu.description: TUN interface MTU. Should be <=1440 to avoid fragmentation with IPv6 overhead (20 bytes larger header).
